---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for UmkmAI
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Summary

<!-- A short, clear description of the feature you are requesting. -->

## 🎯 Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who would benefit? -->
<!-- Example: "As a seller, I struggle with... because..." -->

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe how you'd like this feature to work. -->
<!-- Be as specific as possible — UI flow, API behavior, data model changes, etc. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other solutions or workarounds have you tried or considered? -->

## 📊 Impact

<!-- Who would benefit from this feature? -->
- [ ] All users
- [ ] WhatsApp users only
- [ ] Instagram users only
- [ ] Self-hosted operators
- [ ] Developers / contributors

## 📷 Mockups / Examples

<!-- Add any wireframes, screenshots from other apps, or examples that illustrate your idea. -->

## 📋 Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, related issues, or references. -->
